active_product_desc: Inactive products stay saved but can be filtered out.
active_transport_desc: Only the selected transport will run on this Client. LAN and Cloud settings stay saved.
active_transport_locked_desc: The alternate transport is not configured yet. Set it up first, then switching will be enabled.
add_to_quick_products_help: Place this product in the first empty Quick Products slot after saving
admin_created_sign_in: Admin account created. Please sign in.
advanced_debug_information_desc: Technical sync details are hidden by default.
advanced_sync_settings_desc: Technical actions and Host Transfer are kept here to protect the main Sync flow.
all_data_reset: All business data has been reset.
update_available_desc: Ventio {version} is ready to install. Save your work, then start the installer.
update_install_confirm_desc: Ventio {version} will close while the installer finishes. Save your work before continuing.
update_downloading_desc: Downloading the update package. Please keep Ventio open.
update_installing_desc: Ventio {version} will close while the installer finishes.
update_installer_started: Update installer started. Follow the installer to finish updating Ventio.
approve_host_transfer_desc: This device will stop being Host and {deviceId} will become the new Host. Continue?
about_ventio_desc: Product identity, version, and device details.
about_ventio_summary: Offline-first sales, inventory, sync, and backup management for growing stores.
auto_cloud_client_desc: Automatically pushes local changes quickly and polls cloud using the interval below.
auto_corrections_need_review_desc: These were created automatically when a sale exceeded recorded stock.
auto_sync_desc: Automatically push local changes and pull host updates every 30 seconds.
backup_desc: Prepared for future cloud sync and backup.
backup_download_not_supported: File download is not supported on this device right now.
backup_preview_desc: You can download a JSON file, preview it, or restore it from a file or pasted text.
backup_restore_desc: Copy your data as JSON and restore it later on another device.
backup_restore_failed: Backup restore failed. Please check the pasted JSON.
barcode_not_registered_purchase: Barcode is not registered for a stock-tracked purchase product.
barcode_out_of_stock: No available stock for this product.
barcode_stock_limit_reached: Available stock limit reached for this product.
base_unit_help: Base unit uses the main barcode and sale price above. Add boxes, packs, grams, or other units here with their own barcode and conversion to the base inventory unit.
branch_id_recover_hint: Leave blank to recover the latest branch
built_in_admin_desc: The Admin role always has all permissions and cannot be edited or deleted.
cancel_expense_desc: Cancelled expenses stay in the record and are excluded from totals. This action replaces deleting a posted expense.
cancel_purchase_desc: Cancel this purchase? If it was received, stock will be reversed.
cancel_return_confirm: Cancel/return invoice {invoice} and restore its stock?
camera_scanner_error_desc: Close other apps using the camera, allow camera permission, then try again.
camera_scanner_not_supported: Camera scanning is not supported on this device.
camera_scanner_not_supported_desc: Use a USB barcode scanner or enter the code manually. Camera scanning is available on Android, iOS, macOS, and Web.
cart_restored_with_missing_products: Cart restored, but some products were skipped
claiming_lan_pairing: Claiming LAN pairing code and creating device token... 35%
clear_local_data_warning: This will erase all local data, settings, and Host pairing on this Client device. Other devices will not be affected.
clear_sync_settings_pending_confirm: This will remove old pending changes created by Sync settings or device identity updates only. Products, sales, customers, and other business changes will stay untouched.
client_pairing_enter_or_scan_host_code: Scan the Host QR code or enter a Host pairing code in the LAN or Cloud settings below.
client_resume_detected: Resume confirmed. You can sign in again.
client_still_suspended: This device is still suspended by the Host.
client_suspended_by_host_desc: This device has been suspended by the Host. Contact the main device administrator to resume access.
cloud_api_url_helper: Use the default value unless your Store uses a custom server.
cloud_host_auto_desc: The HOST checks Vercel for remote requests and pushes official changes automatically.
cloud_not_configured_cannot_switch: Cloud is not configured. Connect to Store with Cloud details before switching.
cloud_pairing_code_helper: Paste the pairing code or scan the QR code from the Host.
cloud_pairing_complete_background: Cloud pairing complete. Initial data may continue in the background... 100%
cloud_push_failed: was saved locally, but Cloud push failed
cloud_push_success: pushed to Cloud. Clients can rebuild or sync now.
cloud_sync_desc: Allow remote devices to sync through the cloud.
cloud_sync_not_enabled_for_store: Cloud Sync is not enabled for this store. Enable it from Admin > Subscribers, then sign in again.
cloud_sync_not_ready_yet: Cloud Sync is not ready yet. Sign in online and save Cloud Sync settings first.
cloud_tenant_id: Cloud tenant ID / future Neon tenant
cloud_token_helper_professional: Host only. Client devices connect using a secure one-time pairing code.
confirm_clear_cart: Clear the current cart? This cannot be undone.
confirm_host_safety_status: Before continuing, confirm your Host safety status:
confirm_recovery_saved: I confirm that I saved this recovery information securely.
connect_device_desc: Choose LAN or Cloud, then connect to the Host device.
connect_device_to_store: Connect this device to a Store
connect_device_to_store_desc: Choose LAN or Cloud, enter the pairing code, or scan the Host QR code. After pairing, the device downloads Store data and returns to Login.
connect_to_store_desc: Set up the missing sync transport by scanning a QR code during setup or entering the pairing details manually here. Configured transports stay read-only and can be used as a backup path.
connected_lan_sign_in: LAN host is Active. Please sign in.
connected_store_sign_in: Connected to Store. Please sign in.
connecting_cloning: Connecting to host and cloning data...
connection_cloud_host_heartbeat_active: Cloud heartbeat is active for this host.
connection_cloud_not_configured: Cloud is not configured on this device.
connection_cloud_waiting_heartbeat: Cloud is reachable. Waiting for this host heartbeat to publish.
connection_failed_check_code: Connection failed. Check the code and connection details, then try again.
connection_lan_host_active: LAN host is active on this device.
connection_lan_not_configured: LAN is not configured on this device.
connection_lan_web_disabled: LAN is not available in the web version.
connection_no_host_heartbeat: No host heartbeat has been published yet.
connection_role_client_desc: This device is connected as a client. Host reachability is shown by transport.
connection_role_host_desc: This device is the main store host. LAN and Cloud are shown separately.
connection_role_local_desc: This device is running locally without a paired host.
create_admin_desc: Create your private admin account before using the app. The default admin password will be removed.
currencies_pricing_desc: Manage USD/LBP exchange rate, price display, default product currency, and LBP rounding.
customers_page_desc: Manage customer records for invoices and follow-up.
data_management_desc: Reset all business records and start with an empty database. Store profile is kept.
database_delete_confirm: Delete this record? This action will be synced to other devices.
database_warning: Manual database editing is powerful. Review values carefully before saving because changes affect sync and reports.
delete_draft_purchase_desc: This draft purchase has not affected stock yet. It will be hidden from the purchases list and synced as deleted.
delete_sync_device_confirm: This will remotely erase all local data on this Client device. After confirmation, the Host will keep the device as Wipe Pending and send an automatic wipe command by LAN and/or Cloud. The Client will wipe itself on first sync contact without user approval. Continue?
device_connected_waiting_store_data: Device connected successfully. Waiting for Store data.
device_reset_sign_in: This device was reset. Please sign in or set up again.
discard_purchase_message: This purchase has unsaved items. Do you want to discard the changes?
discount_exceeds_subtotal: Discount cannot be greater than subtotal.
duplicate_purchase_saved_as_draft: Purchase duplicated as a new draft. Review it, then receive it when ready.
enable_cloud_before_pairing_code: Enable Cloud Sync and save settings before generating a pairing code.
enable_lan_before_pairing_code: Enable LAN Sync and save settings before generating a pairing code.
evidence_optional_help: Photo name, document reference, or short proof note
final_reset_warning: You will lose all data on this device. This reset cannot be undone from inside the app.
held_cart_products_missing: The products in this held cart are no longer available
hold_current_cart_first: Hold or clear the current cart before restoring another held cart
host_changed_notification: Host changed for {storeId} / {branchId}. New Host Device ID: {deviceId}
host_heartbeat_stale: Host heartbeat is stale. The Host is probably offline.
host_ip_desc: Use this IP from LAN Clients if automatic discovery does not find the Host.
host_ip_help: On Host this can stay as 0.0.0.0 or your LAN IP. On Client enter the Host LAN IP.
host_ip_helper: Enter the Host IP or scan the Host QR code.
host_ip_required_lan: Host IP is required for LAN connection.
host_lan_cloud_controlled: Host: LAN and Cloud are controlled from Sync page
host_mode_desc: Run this device as the main host for other devices on the local network.
host_transfer_activation_hint: Activation becomes available after the current Host approves this Device ID.
import_backup_host_only: Import backup is only available on the Host device.
invalid_login: Invalid username or password. Try again.
invalid_non_negative_number: Enter a number that is zero or greater
invalid_purchase_quantity: Quantity must be greater than zero.
inventory_page_desc: Review all products, stock levels, and inventory value.
invoice_cancelled_stock_restored: Invoice cancelled and stock was restored.
invoice_empty: No items added to the invoice yet.
invoice_ready_desc: The invoice has been saved. You can print it now or later from the recent invoices list.
keyboard_shortcuts_desc: Customize Windows POS shortcuts, including F keys, Enter, Esc, or disabling an action.
keyboard_shortcuts_sale_hint: Choose a key for each Sale page action. Select None to disable an action. Duplicate keys are blocked inside the same page.
lan_client_connected_cloned: LAN Client connected and cloned from Host.
lan_credentials_saved: LAN device credentials saved and host snapshot downloaded... 100%
lan_not_configured_cannot_switch: LAN is not configured. Connect to Store with LAN details before switching.
lan_pairing_code_helper: Paste the one-time LAN pairing code or scan the Host QR code.
lan_sync_alpha_note: Auto-sync note: clients push local changes and pull host updates every 30 seconds. Keep Sync now for manual troubleshooting.
lan_sync_desc: Allow nearby devices on the same network to connect to this Host.
name: Name
new_password_keep_current: New password (leave empty to keep current)
no_connected_devices: I do not have connected devices
no_customers_desc: Create customer records for invoices and follow-up.
no_expenses_desc: Track electricity, transport, rent, and other expenses.
no_host_heartbeat: No Host heartbeat was found. Start the Host device once to publish its status.
no_local_ipv4: No local IPv4 address detected yet.
no_low_stock_alerts_non_stock: No low-stock alerts for non-stock items
no_low_stock_items: No low stock items right now.
no_products_desc: Add your first product to start selling.
no_sales_desc: Create your first invoice from this page.
no_stock_tracked_products: No stock-tracked products are available for purchase receiving.
no_suppliers_desc: Add supplier records for purchasing and follow-up.
no_sync_settings_pending_found: No invalid Sync settings pending changes were found.
no_waste_loss_records: No waste or loss records yet.
pair_new_device_desc: Generate a single-use QR code or pairing code for a new device.
pairing_code_expired_or_used: Pairing code expired or already used. Ask the Host device for a new code.
pairing_code_ready_to_connect_help: Pairing code entered. Tap Connect to Store to continue.
pairing_code_state_help: This code is {status}. Generate a new code if needed.
pairing_state_refresh_failed: Device paired successfully. Restart sign-in if the new store data is not visible yet.
pairing_token_help: Use the same token on Host and Client.
password_recovery_not_configured: Password recovery is not configured yet.
pdf_action_failed: PDF action failed on this device.
permanent_delete_sync_device_confirm: This removes the device record from the Host list immediately. The remote wipe request remains sent if the Client is offline or lost. Continue?
permanently_delete_expense_desc: Only cancelled expenses can be permanently deleted. This is intended for database cleanup only.
permanently_delete_purchase_desc: This is allowed only for cancelled purchases and requires database/admin permission. The record will be hidden and synced as deleted.
pos_checkout_desc: Add products quickly, adjust quantities, and save the invoice in one place.
pos_terminal_desc: Scan barcode, build a fast cart, complete payment, and print the receipt.
post_expense_desc: Posting locks this expense for accounting. It can only be cancelled later, not edited or deleted.
product_code_not_found: Product code was not found or the item is out of stock.
products_page_desc: Manage products, prices, and stock levels.
purchase_permanently_deleted: Cancelled purchase permanently deleted from the interface.
purchase_returned_stock_reversed: Purchase return registered and stock was reversed.
purchases_desc: Create purchase invoices, receive stock, and keep supplier buying history.
qr_detected_review_connect: QR detected. Review the connection details, then connect.
qr_pairing_empty: Scan a QR code or enter the pairing details manually.
quantity_delta_help: Use positive numbers to add stock and negative numbers to remove stock.
quick_grid_unsaved_changes_desc: You have unsaved quick product layout changes. What would you like to do?
rebuild_from_host_desc: This clears this Client device and downloads a fresh Host snapshot/events. Host data will not be changed.
rebuild_keep_open_desc: Keep this screen open while the Client clears local data, downloads the Host snapshot, and verifies it.
receive_now_desc: When enabled, product quantities and costs are updated immediately.
recover_existing_store_desc: This device will download the latest store snapshot from the server, become the new Host, and notify linked Clients to switch to this Host. Recovery Key is not required.
recover_store_identity_desc: Build a new Host identity for this device and download identity details only. No sync permission is required.
recover_store_data_desc: Download the latest store snapshot and restore store data on this device. Sync permission is required.
remember_me_desc: Skip login next time this app opens.
replace_host_reset_required: To connect this device to a different Host, reset local data first, then pair it again. This prevents accidental data replacement.
reset_all_data_confirm: This will delete all products, customers except Walk-in, invoices, suppliers, expenses, and reset invoice numbering. This cannot be undone. Create a backup first if needed.
reset_host_local_factory_desc: This is a local factory reset for this Host device. It will not create sync events.
reset_protection_backup_generated: A reset-protection backup was generated. Enter this token to continue:
reset_sync_setup_confirm: This will only reset Host/Client sync setup. Business data will stay on this device. Restart the app to see the setup screen again.
return_purchase_desc: Register a purchase return? Received stock will be reversed and supplier ledger will be adjusted.
return_sale_confirm: Return invoice {invoice} and restore its stock?
role_not_allowed_to_sell: Current role is not allowed to sell.
sale_returned_stock_restored: Sale returned and stock was restored.
sale_validation_failed: Could not save invoice. Please recheck stock, quantities, and discount.
sales_page_desc: Create invoices and review recent sales.
scan_barcode_help: Point the camera at the product barcode. The code will be filled automatically.
scan_barcode_hint: Scan with barcode reader or type the code then press Enter
scan_or_enter_host_pairing_code: Scan the Host QR code or enter the pairing code from the Host.
scan_pairing_qr_help: Point the camera at the Host pairing QR code.
scanner_feedback_desc: Control the confirmation sound and vibration after each barcode scan.
scanner_feedback_sound_desc: Play the standard Ventio beep after a successful scan.
scanner_feedback_vibration_desc: Use vibration or haptic feedback when available.
search_inventory: Search inventory by name, code, or category...
search_products_pro: Search name, SKU, barcode, brand, supplier...
shortcut_key_already_used: This shortcut is already used by another action on this page.
show_reviewed_corrections_desc: Include corrections already checked by a supervisor.
signin_hint: Sign in with your Ventio username and password.
stock_count_desc: Create a count session, enter actual quantities, and approve only when ready. Sales and purchases can continue; each line uses its own counted time.
stock_ignored_non_stock: Ignored for services and non-stock items
stock_limit_reached: Stock limit reached for this product.
store_information_desc: Store name, phone, address, and logo.
store_recovery_security_desc: Save this recovery file in a secure place. It contains only store access information and no business data. The recovery key is shown here for export only; keep it private.
switch_transport_available: Alternate transport is configured. You can switch between LAN and Cloud.
switch_transport_locked: Switch is locked until the alternate transport is configured.
sync_device_permanently_deleted: Device record permanently deleted from the Host list.
sync_failed_check_info: Failed. Please check the information and try again.
sync_monitoring_client_desc: Track this Client's synchronization state with the Host.
sync_monitoring_host_desc: Track paired Clients and their synchronization state.
sync_monitoring_source_hint: Devices are shown from Cloud, LAN pairing, or sync history. Use Suspend to block syncing without deleting history.
sync_settings_desc: Choose the device type first. Only the required settings are shown.
sync_setup_desc: Choose Host for the main device with clean local data. Choose Client to copy the full database from the Host, then sync automatically online/offline.
sync_wipe_pending: Remote wipe requested. The device remains visible as Wipe Pending. Use Permanent Delete to remove the record manually.
system_foundation_desc: Store, branch, device role, app role, and sync mode.
track_quantity_help: Enable stock tracking for this product
track_stock_desc: Disable it for services or non-stock items.
transfer_host_role_desc: Approve a Client device to become the new Host. This device will become a Client after approval.
update_supplier_prices_desc: Some purchase costs are different from the saved supplier price list. Do you want to update the supplier prices for these products?
uploading_host_event: Uploading critical Host event to Cloud... 70%
verifying_pairing_code: Verifying pairing code and creating device token... 35%
walk_in_cash_only: Walk-in customer sales must be paid in full.
web_cloud_lan_desc: Web build uses Cloud API + Neon. LAN Host/Client is Desktop only.
keyboard_shortcuts_payment_hint: Choose shortcuts for the Confirm payment dialog. Duplicate keys are blocked inside this dialog only.
shortcuts_disabled_for_page: Shortcuts are disabled for this page.
keyboard_shortcuts_purchases_hint: Choose shortcuts for the Purchases page. The same key cannot be used twice within Purchases.
keyboard_shortcuts_purchase_dialog_hint: Choose shortcuts for the new/duplicate purchase dialog. The same key cannot be used twice within this dialog.
provisioning_wait_message: You can keep this device online. The app will open automatically when provisioning finishes.
database_saved_restart: Database saved. Restart/reload the app if another screen does not update immediately.
create_two_stock_products_first: Create at least two stock-tracked products first.
stress_lab_description: Temporary real-app simulation. Uses the real AppStore services, stock logic, sync queue, and active sync transport. Log stays in memory until Clear Log is pressed.
database_password_hint: Enter the current admin password to open the database page.
admin_password_required: Please enter your admin password to continue.
delete_record_question: Delete this record from the selected database key?
delete_database_key_question: Delete the full key "{key}" from local database?
initial_store_data_downloading: Initial Store data is downloading from the Host.
cloud_rebuild_completed_fresh: Cloud rebuild completed from a requested fresh Host snapshot.
cloud_rebuild_pulled_but_issues: Cloud rebuild pulled a fresh Host snapshot, but local verification found problems
cloud_rebuild_no_snapshot_yet: Cloud rebuild requested a fresh Host snapshot, but no snapshot was pulled yet. Keep the Host online and retry.
pairing_code_different_store: Pairing code belongs to a different Store
use_current_host_pairing_code: Use the current Host pairing code.
device_paired_sign_in: Device paired successfully. Please sign in.
device_paired_login_downloaded: Device paired successfully. Login data downloaded. Please sign in; remaining Store data will continue downloading.
device_paired_waiting_host_login: Device paired successfully. Waiting for Host login data. Keep the Host online; Store data will download automatically.
device_paired_initial_download_auto: Device paired successfully. Initial Store data will download automatically when the Host is online.
only_clients_host_transfer: Only Clients can request Host transfer.
only_hosts_approve_transfer: Only Hosts can approve Host transfer.
no_other_active_host: No other active Host was found.
host_still_uploading_store_data: Host is still uploading store data. Download will continue automatically.
cloud_api_url_token_required: Cloud API URL and token are required.
only_host_create_pairing_codes: Only the Host can create pairing codes.
only_host_check_pairing_status: Only the Host can check pairing code status.
unauthorized_token_invalid_client: Unauthorized/Token invalid: this Client has no saved device token. Pair this device again.
another_active_host_connected: Another active Host is already connected for store
heartbeat_only_cloud_host: Heartbeat is only sent by a cloud-enabled Host device.
cloud_not_active_transport: Cloud is not the active/configured sync transport for this device.
host_devices_no_pull_cloud: Host devices do not pull authoritative Cloud changes.
cloud_event_log_gap_snapshot_required: Cloud event log gap detected. Snapshot repair is required.
cloud_pull_pagination_missing_cursor: Cloud pull pagination failed: missing next cursor.
lan_sync_web_unavailable: LAN sync is not available in the web build. Use Cloud Sync/API instead.
lan_pairing_web_unavailable: LAN pairing is not available in the web build.
lan_initial_clone_web_unavailable: LAN initial clone is not available in the web build.
lan_pull_web_unavailable: LAN pull is not available in the web build.
lan_push_web_unavailable: LAN push is not available in the web build.
lan_repair_web_unavailable: LAN repair is not available in the web build. Use Cloud Sync/API instead.
maintenance_repair_confirm_desc: Ventio will run a safe repair action. Create a backup first if this is a production device.
maintenance_center_desc: Simple health summary, database status, recommendations, and technical diagnostics.
technical_report_desc: This JSON is for developer/support use. The readable summary above is for daily maintenance.
save_change_create_db: Save a change to create the database file.
backup_recommendation_desc: Create backups before updates, migration, or device changes.
backup_status_dashboard_desc: Local and Google Drive backup readiness.
no_maintenance_action_needed: No maintenance problems need action right now.
review_warnings_before_production: Review the warnings below before continuing production work.
client_maintenance_desc: Client maintenance affects only this device and is never synced to other devices.
user_requested_host_role_reason: User requested Host role from Sync Settings.
host_transfer_request_created: Host transfer request created. Ask the current Host to approve this Device ID: {deviceId}
host_transfer_approved_wait_activation: Host transfer approved. This device remains Host until the new Host activates.
host_transfer_activated_now_host: Host transfer activated. This device is now Host. Other Clients will switch after receiving HOST_CHANGED.
no_paired_clients_found: No paired Clients found. Pair a Client first, then run Test Connection again.
default_invoice_footer: Thank you for shopping with us.
pairing_data_mismatch: Pairing data does not match this Store connection ({items}). Scan the correct QR code or ask the Host for a new code.
connection_different_store: This connection belongs to a different Store ({items}). Use the QR/code from the currently paired Host.
no_eligible_delivery: No eligible invoices without delivery notes.
convert_quotation_question: Convert {quotationNo} to a sale invoice? Stock will be deducted when the invoice is created.
no_quotations_desc: Create quotations without affecting stock, then convert accepted quotations to sale invoices.
supplier_prices_desc: Keep official purchase prices for each supplier. Purchase history remains available separately.
add_suppliers_first_for_prices: Add suppliers first to manage supplier prices.
supplier_price_duplicate: This supplier already has a saved price for this product.
maintenance_rec_create_db: Run the app once, then run the health check again to confirm the SQLite database file is created.
maintenance_rec_add_products: Add products to start inventory tracking.
maintenance_rec_first_sale: Create a first sale invoice to validate the sales workflow.
maintenance_rec_sync: Open sync tools and complete pending synchronization when the network is available.
maintenance_rec_conflicts: Review data conflicts before creating more invoices.
maintenance_rec_backup_fresh: Create a fresh backup before major updates or device changes.
maintenance_rec_backup_after: Create a backup after fixing any maintenance warnings.
maintenance_issue_deep_diagnostics_skipp: Deep data scans are skipped during quick refresh to keep Maintenance fast. Use Run deep diagnostics when needed.
maintenance_issue_database_location_foun: SQLite database file found in private Ventio storage.
maintenance_issue_database_location_miss: SQLite database file is not visible yet. Open the app once, then run maintenance again.
maintenance_issue_backups_managed_by_hos: Backups are managed by the Host device.
maintenance_issue_local_backup_never: Automatic local backup is enabled, but no successful backup was recorded yet.
maintenance_issue_local_backup_old: Automatic local backup is older than the recommended window.
maintenance_issue_google_drive_not_conne: Google Drive backup is not connected.
maintenance_issue_google_drive_disabled: Google Drive backup is connected but automatic backup is disabled.
maintenance_issue_google_drive_never: Google Drive backup is enabled, but no successful backup was recorded yet.
maintenance_issue_google_drive_old: Google Drive backup is older than the recommended window.
maintenance_issue_zero_cost_products_ok: No active products with zero cost.
maintenance_issue_zero_price_products_ok: No active products with zero price.
maintenance_issue_empty_sales_found: {count} sales do not contain any items.
maintenance_issue_overpaid_sales_found: {count} sales have paid amount greater than invoice total.
maintenance_issue_sale_items_missing_pro: No sale items reference missing products.
{count} sale items reference products that are not in the active catalog.
maintenance_issue_empty_purchases_found: {count} purchases do not contain any items.
maintenance_recheck_no_changes: No data was changed. The health check was refreshed only.
maintenance_cloud_queue_repair_none: No missing Host to Cloud queue rows were found.
maintenance_cloud_queue_repair_count: {count} missing Host to Cloud queue rows were recreated.
snapshot_progress_keep_open: Keep this screen open until all sections are completed.
invalid_json: Invalid JSON. Fix the text before saving.
first_run_online_required: First run must stay Online to create the trial account on the server.
trial_created_sign_in: Trial account created. You have {days} days. Please sign in.
cloud_sync_plan_required: Cloud Sync is not included in this store plan.
cloud_sync_plan_locked_desc: This store is not subscribed to Cloud Sync. Ask the administrator to enable it from Admin > Subscribers.
device_limit_no_devices: No devices are linked to this store.
device_limit_reached:
You have reached the maximum number of devices allowed by your subscription.

To add more devices, please contact Ventio Support.
account_password_min_6: Password must be at least 6 characters.
account_settings_description: Manage the online account connected to this store.
account_change_password_subtitle: Update the server password for this online account.
account_management_description: This is the online account area for your store. The POS and inventory system stay available from Offline login on this device.
catalog_delete_last_item_error: At least one item must remain.
catalog_delete_unused_confirm: Delete {name}? This item is not used by any product.
catalog_replace_delete_confirm: {name} is used by {count} product(s). Choose a replacement, then the products will be moved before deletion.
